title: Update nix pin with `make nixpkgs`
body:
- Bugfix `make nixpkgs` which pin with branch `nixos-20.09`
  - Code lint with `nixpkgs-fmt`
  - Code sync between x86\_64 and aarch64

Signed-off-by: Wong Hoi Sing Edison <hswong3i@pantarei-design.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
> [NO TESTS NEEDED]

Just force pushed, does the commit message format correct?

> > [NO TESTS NEEDED]
> 
> Just force pushed, does the commit message format correct?

That should work.  We usually put it in the _body_ rather than in the title. Thanks!
LGTM
Personally prefer it in the commit title, so it doesn't clutter commit messages.
